verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For a long time I travelled, down along lonely road My heart was so heavy and see I sunk low Then I heard about Jesus, what a wonderful hour I'm so glad that I found out He could bring me out by his saving power

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We'll thank God I am free, free, free From this world of sin Washed in the blood of Jesus, I've been born again Hallelujah, I'm saved, saved, saved by his wonderful grace I'm so glad that I found out, he could bring me out and showed me the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a bird out of prison that has taken its flight Like a blind man that God gave back his sight Like poor ritched beggar that's a fortune and fame I'm so glad that I found out, he could bring me out and show me the way.
